title: DarkDots
description: A dark UI theme based around modern web interface design.  Clean, simple, and round.
body:
Have you ever thought that Minecraft's interface was too bright? Too unique? Too old-fashioned?
This pack fixes all of that!

All of Minecraft's UI elements have been redesigned from the ground up to feel darker and more modern, like something that could have jumped straight out of a web app.

All buttons are flat shapes with rounded corners!
Many icons have been redesigned for readability!
All UI panels have been rebuild with a strict light-on-dark color scheme!

Check out the screenshots for examples!

Note: I don't know how some of the textures are used. If you manage to find a texture in-game with a poorly drawn '?', please let me know how you found it!
